title: England playing their best cricket in years - Hartley | Cricket News
description: Former spinner Alex Hartley says England are playing their best cricket "for years" and she is "very confident" about their chances in Thursday's T20 World Cup

blocks.text: Cricket update: England playing their best cricket in years - Hartley. Former spinner Alex Hartley says England are playing their best cricket "for years" and she is "very confident" about their chances in Thursday's T20 World Cup semi-final.
